rag_rules: Use AGREE logical operators and temporal recurrence patterns for contract equations
Place component type contracts in component type annexes, not implementation scopes
generic_rules: Assumptions and guarantees should reference visible inputs/outputs, not implementation-only paths
Constants and equations in AGREE contracts must use valid scalar types (int, real, bool)
Generated AGREE contracts must use valid component type scopes for port-based assumptions
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use `if ... then ... else` for branching logic in AGREE equations
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes unless represented through visible variables
Do not generate range assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or named constants
